steps.title: Use complementary angles
steps.content:
In a right triangle, the two acute angles add to $90^\circ$. The figure shows one acute angle as $24^\circ$, so the other angle satisfies
$$a+24=90$$

steps.title: Solve for the angle
steps.content:
Subtract $24$ from both sides.
$$a=90-24=66$$
The answer is B.
